message.content:
@startuml
actor UserController
participant ThemeController
database CommentController

alt [successful]
    login() ->> : 
    note right of login(): Success(save session)
else [no register]
    activate UserController
    register() --> UserController
end

list() ..>> ThemeController
themeID -[dotted]-> CommentController
activate CommentController
note left of themeID: list(themeID)

group alt your comments
edit() .-> CommentController
notedown "can't edit" over not_your_comments
